content.verdict: Round Hill is the grande dame of Jamaican luxury — a 110-acre former pimento and coconut plantation eight miles west of Montego Bay, opened in 1953 and shaped by the regulars who built it: Noel Coward, Cole Porter, Grace Kelly, Ralph Lauren (who designed the rooms in the Pineapple House). The 27 cliffside cottages and 36 oceanfront rooms occupy a private cove with a crescent of sand, the kind of refined, understated colonial-Caribbean elegance that has nothing to do with all-inclusive resort culture and everything to do with old-money winter retreats.
content.best_room: The plantation cottages are the soul of Round Hill — privately owned, individually decorated, and rented when the owners are away. Each has its own pool, gardens, and a butler-cook who prepares breakfast on the terrace. For honeymooners, Cottage 16 and Cottage 25 are perched directly on the cliff with private plunge pools and unobstructed Caribbean sunsets. The Pineapple House oceanfront rooms, designed by Ralph Lauren in his signature crisp white-and-mahogany palette, are the most romantic of the main hotel rooms.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Cliffside Sunset
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into Sangster International Airport (MBJ) in Montego Bay — Round Hill is a 25-minute drive west along the coast. Arrival drinks on the terrace overlooking the cove, then a quiet first dinner at the open-air main dining room as the sun sets over the Caribbean. The hotel's signature jerk pork at the beach BBQ is the essential first taste of Jamaica.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Beach Cove & Sailing
itinerary_7_nights.description: A full day on the private cove — the sand is fine, the water clear, and the snorkeling reef is a five-minute swim from the beach. Sunfish sailboats and kayaks are complimentary. Lunch on the beach at the Beach Café with grilled snapper and a Red Stripe, then an afternoon at the Fern Tree Spa for a couples' massage.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Negril Seven Mile Beach Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Drive 90 minutes west to Negril for the day — Seven Mile Beach is the longest stretch of unbroken sand in Jamaica. Lunch at Rick's Café on the western cliffs to watch the famous cliff-divers, then return to Round Hill in the late afternoon. The drive back along the north coast at dusk is one of Jamaica's quietly beautiful moments.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Blue Hole & Secret Falls
itinerary_7_nights.description: A guided trip inland to the Blue Hole (also called Island Gully Falls) above Ocho Rios — a series of turquoise plunge pools, rope swings, and small waterfalls hidden in the jungle. Less crowded than Dunn's River Falls and far more romantic. Lunch at a roadside jerk stand in Faith's Pen on the way back, the local benchmark for jerk chicken.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Tennis, Spa & Plantation Tour
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning tennis on the historic clay courts where Ralph Lauren still plays, then a tour of Round Hill's organic farm and the surviving pimento and breadfruit trees from the original plantation. Afternoon spa treatment in the cliffside spa cottages — the open-air massage rooms hang directly over the Caribbean.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Catamaran Sunset Cruise
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private sunset catamaran from Round Hill's beach along the western coast — the boat anchors offshore for swimming and snorkeling, then drinks and hors d'oeuvres are served as the sun drops behind the horizon. The crew plays Bob Marley and Toots on the way back. Late dinner on the cliff terrace under the bougainvillea.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Final Beach Morning & Departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: A final breakfast on the cottage terrace — fresh papaya, ackee and saltfish, and Blue Mountain coffee — then a quiet morning swim before the short drive back to MBJ. Round Hill's loyal returning guests often book the same week, the same cottage, year after year for decades.

caveats: Round Hill is not all-inclusive — meals, drinks, and most activities are charged separately, which surprises guests expecting Jamaica's typical all-inclusive model.
The 'beach' is a small crescent cove — beautiful but compact compared to the long beaches of Negril or Ocho Rios; couples wanting endless sand should plan a Negril day trip.
The plantation cottages vary significantly in style and condition because each is owner-decorated; ask the reservations team for current photos of the specific cottage assigned.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Round Hill is one of the Caribbean's most romantic honeymoon properties — the cliffside cottages with private plunge pools, the historic plantation atmosphere, and the impeccable old-school service create exactly the refined, intimate honeymoon backdrop that all-inclusive mega-resorts cannot match. Generations of celebrity honeymoons have started here for good reason.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: December through April is Jamaica's dry season and Round Hill's peak — sunny days, low humidity, and the famous winter-residents social scene. May and June offer excellent value and warm seas before the August-October hurricane risk period. November is shoulder season with low rates and lovely weather.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: The plantation cottages book 6 to 12 months ahead for Christmas, New Year, and February-March peak. The Pineapple House rooms have more flexibility but still require 3 months ahead for high season. Round Hill's loyal returning guests reserve the same cottages year after year — flexibility on dates helps.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: Round Hill is family-friendly and welcomes children, but the property's quiet plantation atmosphere, refined service, and emphasis on adult social rituals (cocktail hour, dressed-up dinners) means it skews heavily adult and couples. Honeymooners blend in seamlessly.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Cottage 16 or Cottage 25 on the cliff with private plunge pools are the most romantic — the butler-cook breakfast on the terrace each morning is a defining Round Hill experience. The Pineapple House oceanfront rooms by Ralph Lauren are the best of the main hotel for couples preferring central location.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Sangster International Airport (MBJ) in Montego Bay is the gateway — Round Hill arranges private transfers for the 25-minute drive west along the coast road. Direct flights to MBJ run from most major North American and UK cities. The airport-to-hotel transfer is one of the easiest in the Caribbean.
